Mad Max: Fury Road (2015)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $154,363,726Details
International Box Office $226,100,000
Worldwide Box Office $380,463,726
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $20,834,613
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $36,129,322
Total $56,963,935
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Haunted by his turbulent past, Mad Max believes the best way to survive is to wander alone. Nevertheless, he becomes swept up with a group fleeing across the Wasteland in a War Rig driven by an elite Imperator, Furiosa. They are escaping a Citadel tyrannized by the Immortan Joe, from whom something irreplaceable has been taken. Enraged, the Warlord marshals all his gangs and pursues the rebels ruthlessly in the high-octane Road War that follows.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$45,428,128 (29.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.40 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:40.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$150,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.5 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,702 opening theaters/3,722 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $218,642,136

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 15th, 2015 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
May 15th, 2015 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.

May 14th, 2015 (Wide) (Philippines)
May 14th, 2015 (Wide) (Thailand)
May 14th, 2015 (Wide) (Switzerland)
May 14th, 2015 (Wide) (Belgium)
Video Release: August 11th, 2015 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for intense sequences of violence throughout, and for disturbing images.

Running Time: 120 minutes
Franchise: Mad Max
Award nomination: 2016 Oscars Best Picture Nominee

Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Haunted by his turbulent past, Mad Max believes the best way to survive is to wander alone. Nevertheless, he becomes swept up with a group fleeing across the Wasteland in a War Rig driven by an elite Imperator, Furiosa. They are escaping a Citadel tyrannized by the Immortan Joe, from whom something irreplaceable has been taken. Enraged, the Warlord marshals all his gangs and pursues the rebels ruthlessly in the high-octane Road War that follows.
